name: Cognitive Parallax Engine
text: When you would spend a command token form your strategy pool, you may exhaust this card to instead spend a command token from your reinforcements.

name: Overlord Matrix
text: When you activate a system or a system containing your units is activated you may exhaust this card to treate 1 of your units as galvanized during this tactical action for each command token in your tactic pool.

name: Domestic Production Agreements
text: You may treat systems that contain command tokens as units with PRODUCTION equal to the number of command tokens in those systems.

name: Bilateral Nexus
text: When you perform the primary effect of a strategy card, you may exhaust this card to perform the secondary effect of that strategy card without spending a command token.

name: Inner Sanctum
text: Gain the Inner Sanctum planet card and its legendary planet ability card and ready them. You cannot lose these cards, and this card cannot have an X or Y assimilator token placed on it.

name: Kleptocratic Politics
text: After an agenda is revealed, you may exhaust this card and predict aloud the outcome of this agenda. If your prediction is correct, perform the secondary ability of a strategy card without spending a command token.

name: Segmented Structuring
text: After movement, you may remove any number of your non-flagship ships form the active system. Place a number of units up to the combined PRODUCTION value of your units in that system whose combined cost is equal to or less than the removed units.

name: Replicator II
text: This unit cannot be destroyed by "Direct Hit" action cards. This unit can only produce dreadnoughts or units of the same type as those it is transporting.

name: Surveyor's Lens
text: At the end of a tactical action, you may exhaust this card to explore 1 planet you control in the active system. When you gain a relic fragment during exploration, you may remove 1 infantry form the explored planet to ready this card.

name: Trait Harmonizer
text: Increase your commodity value by 1 for each planet trait you control.

name: Ultimate Evolution II
text: When you research or gain a technology, you may flip this card instead.

name: Warspawn Juggernaut II
text: When you research or gain a technology, you may flip this card instead.

name: Seal of Revelation
text:
This technology may be treated as either a biotic or propulsion technology.

ACTION: Exhaust this card to shuffle up to 1 purged exploration card that does not place a token on the game board into its respective deck. Then, explore a planet you control.

name: Sigil of Transmutation
text:
This technology may be treated as either a warfare or cybernetic technology.

When you move ships into a non-home system you may exhaust this card, that system gains SPACE CANNON 5(x3) and PRODUCTION 3 as if it were a unit until the end of that tactical action.

name: Power Word: Fabricate
text: Gain the Fabricate Station planet card and its legendary ability card. You cannot lose these cards, and this card cannot have an X or Y assimilator token placed on it.

name: Power Word: Miracle
text: ACTION: Exhaust this card and do each of the following: Discard 1 action card and draw 2 action cards. Gain 1 command token. Place up to 4 infantry on planets you control.

name: Power Word: Disintegrate
text: At the start of a combat involving your units, you may produce one hit against your opponent's units. At the start of a combat involving your units, you may exhaust this card to destroy a unit involved in that combat.

name: Power Word: Plane Shift
text: ACTION: Exhaust this card to perform a tactical action in a system that contains no planets without spending a command token. Ignore the effects of anomalies during this tactical action.

name: Biomechanical Nutrients
text: When you produce one or more hits with a unit ability you may place 1 ship in a system that contains your ships with a cost less than the number of hits produced.

name: Oblivion Cannon
text: At the end of a round of space combat, you may purge 1 non-fighter ship you control in that system with a cost of 4 or less. Produce and assign hits equal to half its cost (rounded up) against your opponent's units in that system.

name: Mirrored Memories
text: ACTION: Play 1 action card with a component action from the discard pile and exhaust this card. Purge that action card instead of discarding it.

name: Lazarus Pods
text: When you exhaust an agent for its effect or a player purges a hero for its effect, you may produce 2 units in a system that contains 1 of your ships.

name: Eternal Aegis
text: During the first round of combat, you may cancel hits equal to the number of leader types you have unlocked, unexhausted, and unpurged.

name: Specter Step
text: At the end of a tactical action, you may exhaust this card to move 1 of your ships from the active system to an adjacent system that contains 1 or more of your units and no other player's ships.

name: Rift-Touched Bastion
text: When a player activates a system that contains your units, exhaust this card and choose 1 system that contains your units. Treat the chosen system as if it has a gravity rift.

name: Thanatocyte Lattice
text: Once per combat round, when a unit is destroyed, you may assign 1 hit to a unit of the same type as that destroyed unit.

name: Graveyard II
text: Once per action, if a unit in a system containing or adjacent to this unit is destroyed, gain 1 commodity, and produce 1 unit of the same type in this system if able. Up to 8 fighters in this unit's system do not count against capacity.

name: Thunderbird Protocol
text: At the start of space combat involving your units select 2 of your ground forces in that system. Those units participate in space combat as if they were ships and you may treat them as Galvanized until the end of the combat.

name: Renegade II
text: This unit can only transport ground forces. When your opponent's units produce hits with ANTI-FIGHER BARRAGE in this unit's system cancel 1 of those hits.
